project.component: { "keyToString": { ".NET Launch Settings Profile.LogixDb.Service.executor": "Debug", "023f2559-4d27-4bd0-b75c-e1f573990a1d.executor": "Debug", "ml.llm.LLMConfigurable", "to.speed.mode.migration.done": "true", "vue.rearranger.settings.migration": "true" }, "keyToStringList": { "DatabaseDriversLRU": [ "sqlite" ], "com.intellij.ide.scratch.LRUPopupBuilder$1/SQL Dialect": [ "TSQL", "SQLite" ] } }

task.summary: Default task
Delete `SqlDbPruneTargetTests` and `SqliteDbPruneTargetTests`; add SQL scripts for merging data types, members, and routines; refactor `Target` to update `VersionId` type to `int`.
Refactor migrations: standardize key types, enhance column definitions, and update indexes for improved schema consistency. Remove unused `tag_alias` migration.

Refactor entity mappings: standardize key types, update column definitions, remove unused entities, and streamline hashing logic. Remove `TagAliasMap` and related references for improved schema consistency.
Add merge scripts and refactor `SqliteWriter` to support dynamic data handling and version mapping.
Add depth-based sorting to `ModuleTransformer` and `ProgramTransformer`; update migrations to standardize component types, add "rung", and remove redundant `operand_id` usage.
Add merge scripts for components (`aoi`, `controller`, `operand`, etc.), refactor `SqliteWriter` to align with new scripts, and update `GetComponentTables` query for improved schema consistency.
Split `Extensions` into dedicated extension files: `CryptoExtensions`, `CompressionExtensions`, and `FormattingExtensions`. Refactor usages to match the new structure and streamline hashing logic.
Add operands resource file and update `FluentMigrationExtensions` with dependencies for JSON handling
Add merge scripts for all components, refactor `SqlServerWriter` for temp table usage and version-based merges, and update `SqlServerScript` with merge definitions.
Standardize operand JSON resource keys and property names to align with naming conventions.
Refactor migrations to standardize key types, update column definitions, enhance indexes, and remove deprecated entities for schema consistency.
Update SQLite test database file in `LogixDb.Data.Sqlite.Tests`
Remove unused `SuppressMessage` attribute, fix SQLite casing in comments, update `DeleteVersion` to accept `VersionNumber`, and remove unused `PruneTarget` method.
Remove unused `PruneTarget` method from `IDbManager`.
Update migration tests to reflect schema changes: replace `target_instance` with `target_version_map`, add `tag_value`, and remove `tag_alias`.
Refactor migrations: replace foreign key columns with descriptive names, update column definitions, standardize key types, enhance indexes, and improve schema consistency.
Refactor LogixDb schema mappings and hashing: replace foreign key columns with descriptive names, adopt `ComputeHash` for consistency, remove `ElementHasher`, and manage IDs explicitly.
Use `INSERT OR IGNORE` in merge scripts to simplify conflict handling, add `PostVersion` script, refactor temp table creation, and improve merge logic with safer checks.
Make `parent_name` and `parent_port` columns in the `module` table not nullable; remove commented-out primary key and foreign key definitions from the `argument` table creation script.
Update `TargetTests`: rename tests for consistency, add test for custom target key, and enhance performance validation with timing checks.
Remove unused `SourceId` attribute from `Test.L5X` export configuration.
Add unique constraint on `rung_key` in `rung` table to support FK relationships on non-PK columns.
Update migration tests: replace foreign key columns with descriptive names, adjust indexes, and align with schema updates.
Update SQLite test database in `LogixDb.Data.Sqlite.Tests`.

Refactor LogixDb.Data schema mappings: replace `Hash` with `HashText`, adopt `HashElement` for XML hashing, remove unused methods (e.g., `SeedElementIds`), and make table maps publicly accessible. Add metadata-driven caching for record hashes.
Update schema and migration scripts: rename columns in `MergeDataTypeMember.sql` for consistency, add `content_hash` column to `tag` table, and enhance indexes in `tag_member` table.

Refactor migrations, tests, and schema mappings: rename columns and indexes for consistency, add `content_hash` column to `tag` and `routine` tables, and align foreign keys across SQLite and SQL Server tests.
Rename `member_id` to `tag_id` in `tag_comment` table, update migrations, tests, and schema mappings for consistency. Add support for tag comments in `TagTransformer`.
Drop unused mappings, migrations, and scripts; update schema and ensure consistency across `content_hash` column additions, foreign keys, and column renames.
Add `member_index` column to `data_type_member` table; remove redundant index from `target_version` table in migrations.

Refactor `DataTypeTransformer` to filter predefined types, index members, and map metadata; add `member_index` column in `DataTypeMemberMap`; update package reference for `System.Security.Cryptography.Xml`.
Update target posting logic in `SqlServerManager` and `SqliteManager` to retrieve `VersionId` using `ExecuteScalarAsync`; add `MergeTagValue` support for SQLite schema, scripts, and mappings.
Add `member_index` column to `data_type_member` table in SQLite and SQL Server migration tests; comment out `operand_format` assertion in `M20260308Tests`.
Comment out assertions and related scope in `SqliteDbImportTargetTests` to simplify test logic.

Add `member_index` column to `data_type_member` table; update `MergeDataTypeMember` and `MergeTagValue` scripts, transformers, and migrations to reflect schema changes; enhance tagging logic and indexing for performance.
Make `parent_name` and `member_name` columns nullable in `tag_member` table; update `TagTransformer` to handle null parent tags and optimize comment processing.
Add `MergeCodeReference` script, `ReferenceMap` mapping, and `ReferenceRecord` definition; update SQLite writer to support `code_reference` table integration.
Remove `ElementHasher` utility and its related functionality, update reference mappings (`TagMemberMap`, `ReferenceMap`) for consistency, and upgrade package dependencies across projects.
Rename `argument` and `instruction` tables to `rung_argument` and `rung_instruction` for consistency in schema and mapping; update tests, scripts, and references accordingly.
Rename `reference` and `argument` tables to `rung_reference` and `rung_argument` for schema consistency; update mappings, scripts, and tests accordingly.
Update `component` references to `target_component` across merge scripts, adjust mappings in `SqliteWriter`, refine test assertions, and upgrade `L5Sharp` package to version `7.1.0`.
Rename `code_reference` table to `rung_reference` in `RungReferenceMap` for schema consistency.
Remove `MergeArgument.sql` and `MergeInstruction.sql` scripts; update `.idea` configuration to reflect recent changes in project structure and scripts.
Rename `RestoreTargetVersionAsync` to `MergeTargetDataAsync` in both SQL Server and SQLite managers, update method references, and adjust scripts for parameter consistency.
Refactor `SqlServerWriter` to use `Type.ToSqlServerType()` extension, simplify bulk copy options, improve merge script handling, and add test coverage for `rung_reference` table.

Split `PostTarget.sql` into `PostTarget.sql` and `PostVersion.sql`, refactor related scripts and logic in `SqlServerManager`, update tests for `ImportTarget`, expand `source_hash` column, and modify `MergeDataType.sql` for new `content_hash`.

Update merge scripts and migrations to refine schema consistency
- Adjusted `MergeRung.sql`, `MergeOperand.sql`, and other merge scripts to enhance hash matching logic and expand column usage. - Updated migrations to include indexing improvements and column definition refinements. - Removed redundant indexes and unused columns in related tables and scripts. - Revised and expanded test assertions to reflect schema changes.
Rename truncate-related tests and scripts to delete-related for clarity, refine test assertions, and update migration/merge scripts for schema consistency and indexing improvements.
Add `DeleteVersion.sql` script, corresponding tests for SQL Server and SQLite, and update `.idea` configuration to reflect changes.

MESSAGE.value: Update schema and migration scripts: rename columns in `MergeDataTypeMember.sql` for consistency, add `content_hash` column to `tag` table, and enhance indexes in `tag_member` table.

Refactor migrations, tests, and schema mappings: rename columns and indexes for consistency, add `content_hash` column to `tag` and `routine` tables, and align foreign keys across SQLite and SQL Server tests.
Rename `member_id` to `tag_id` in `tag_comment` table, update migrations, tests, and schema mappings for consistency. Add support for tag comments in `TagTransformer`.
Drop unused mappings, migrations, and scripts; update schema and ensure consistency across `content_hash` column additions, foreign keys, and column renames.
Add `member_index` column to `data_type_member` table; remove redundant index from `target_version` table in migrations.

Refactor `DataTypeTransformer` to filter predefined types, index members, and map metadata; add `member_index` column in `DataTypeMemberMap`; update package reference for `System.Security.Cryptography.Xml`.
Update target posting logic in `SqlServerManager` and `SqliteManager` to retrieve `VersionId` using `ExecuteScalarAsync`; add `MergeTagValue` support for SQLite schema, scripts, and mappings.
Add `member_index` column to `data_type_member` table in SQLite and SQL Server migration tests; comment out `operand_format` assertion in `M20260308Tests`.
Comment out assertions and related scope in `SqliteDbImportTargetTests` to simplify test logic.

Add `member_index` column to `data_type_member` table; update `MergeDataTypeMember` and `MergeTagValue` scripts, transformers, and migrations to reflect schema changes; enhance tagging logic and indexing for performance.
Make `parent_name` and `member_name` columns nullable in `tag_member` table; update `TagTransformer` to handle null parent tags and optimize comment processing.
Add `MergeCodeReference` script, `ReferenceMap` mapping, and `ReferenceRecord` definition; update SQLite writer to support `code_reference` table integration.
Remove `ElementHasher` utility and its related functionality, update reference mappings (`TagMemberMap`, `ReferenceMap`) for consistency, and upgrade package dependencies across projects.
Rename `argument` and `instruction` tables to `rung_argument` and `rung_instruction` for consistency in schema and mapping; update tests, scripts, and references accordingly.
Rename `reference` and `argument` tables to `rung_reference` and `rung_argument` for schema consistency; update mappings, scripts, and tests accordingly.
Update `component` references to `target_component` across merge scripts, adjust mappings in `SqliteWriter`, refine test assertions, and upgrade `L5Sharp` package to version `7.1.0`.
Rename `code_reference` table to `rung_reference` in `RungReferenceMap` for schema consistency.
Drop unused merge scripts for `argument` and `instruction` tables; adjust project files for consistency.
Remove `MergeArgument.sql` and `MergeInstruction.sql` scripts; update `.idea` configuration to reflect recent changes in project structure and scripts.
Rename `RestoreTargetVersionAsync` to `MergeTargetDataAsync` in both SQL Server and SQLite managers, update method references, and adjust scripts for parameter consistency.
Refactor `SqlServerWriter` to use `Type.ToSqlServerType()` extension, simplify bulk copy options, improve merge script handling, and add test coverage for `rung_reference` table.

Split `PostTarget.sql` into `PostTarget.sql` and `PostVersion.sql`, refactor related scripts and logic in `SqlServerManager`, update tests for `ImportTarget`, expand `source_hash` column, and modify `MergeDataType.sql` for new `content_hash`.

Update merge scripts and migrations to refine schema consistency
- Adjusted `MergeRung.sql`, `MergeOperand.sql`, and other merge scripts to enhance hash matching logic and expand column usage. - Updated migrations to include indexing improvements and column definition refinements. - Removed redundant indexes and unused columns in related tables and scripts. - Revised and expanded test assertions to reflect schema changes.
Rename truncate-related tests and scripts to delete-related for clarity, refine test assertions, and update migration/merge scripts for schema consistency and indexing improvements.
Add `DeleteVersion.sql` script, corresponding tests for SQL Server and SQLite, and update `.idea` configuration to reflect changes.

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value: Add `DeleteVersion.sql` script, corresponding tests for SQL Server and SQLite, and update `.idea` configuration to reflect changes.
